page.title: Pools
page.description: All Meteora liquidity pools observed by the indexer. Click any row to open the pool's detail page.

empty.title: No pools observed yet
empty.description: The indexer is running but hasn't captured any pool activity yet. Pools will appear here as soon as on-chain events are picked up.

error.title: Unable to load pools
error.timeout: The upstream service took too long to respond. Try refreshing the page in a moment.
error.network: The upstream service is unreachable. Try refreshing the page in a moment.
error.http: The upstream service returned an error.
error.validation: The upstream service returned an unexpected response.

swaps.title: Recent swaps
swaps.empty: No swaps observed yet for this pool. They will appear here as soon as on-chain trade events are picked up.

liquidity.title: Recent liquidity events
liquidity.empty: No liquidity events observed yet for this pool. They will appear here as soon as on-chain add/remove events are picked up.
